text.message: can you get ore port before blue oj?
oj needs to get that port before blue
game is over before it even started

yeah i mean ive drawn 1 card since the start lol
I really do like my first position on this map tbh
man i legit drew 4 cards since the start and u rob me
Yeah, I don't want you to settle
orange you need to use a knight
so u didnt need my brick
to be fair he deserves it too giving the game to blue
you can plow without my brick
he blocked our 6  ore and then traded with blue
do what you want with orange, red, you h ave my blessings
christ ive still only drawn 6 cards in total
i wanna crash out too lol
learn to read the board next time orange, me and red were very nice to you
blue should have been soloed from the start
You have a 54% winrate in 4 player
this guy has high rating on colonist
so im going to report him for kingmaking because an experienced player doesnt make the mistakes he did
You finished top 30 last season mate
still i am not perfect an makes mistakes
Tbh in general I think a lot of people over solo
no player as good as you looks at the board and says yea im going to help blue
But yeah, I was just so far ahead
out of respect for you ranking i have to report you
I've reported you more for the lying, "I'm still learning" lol
Well he didn't end #1 so maybe he is
boring if i already was perfect
must be cool to already be perfect as you guys :)
I'm not perfect, only my setup was
I've never finished top 100 let alone top 30 as you orange
I don't know why you have to lie
nobody who finished top 30 is going to say they are still learning
thats what a new player would say
i am definitely still learning. a lot to learn about this game
maybe you were not paying attention
i already admited i made a mistake
you live in Sweden afterall maybe an attractive lady walked by
but i admitted to it. what more do u want?
i am in fact a lady
Lets get closer to the next game
so maybe a handsome man walked by
but dont say im still learning lol
yes i will continue to say that
